{# Template for the blog index page. Set via "template: blog_index.html" in frontmatter. Renders the post listing from blog_posts context variable (injected by conf.py via html-page-context). #} {% extends "page.html" %} {% macro format_author(raw) -%} {%- for part in raw.split(",") -%} {%- set name = part.strip() -%} {%- if name.startswith("@") -%} {{ name }} {%- else -%} {{ name }} {%- endif -%} {%- if not loop.last %}, {% endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- endmacro %} {% block body %}
{{ super() }}
{% endblock %} {% block content %} {{ body }} {% if blog_posts %}
{% for post in blog_posts %}

{{ post.title }}

{{ post.date }} · {{ format_author(post.author) }}

{{ post.description }}

{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endblock %}
